description: Product Description Tea Light Candles 4 hours ( 100 Pack ) Create a warm and inviting glow with our premium tea light candles . Each candle offers up to 4 hours of steady, smokeless burn, perfect for dinners, parties, or relaxation. Unscented and versatile, they fit most holders and lanterns. Bulk 100 pack ensures you’re always ready for any occasion. Features of Tealights Previous page Next page Premium Wax Unscented Tea Light Candles Zuvo’s 4-hour unscented tea light candles are designed to bring warm, steady illumination to any setting. Each candle features a lead-free cotton wick that burns cleanly without producing smoke, ensuring a safe and pleasant atmosphere. With a standard size that fits most tealight holders, these versatile candles are ideal for weddings, parties, restaurants, spas, or simply creating a cosy ambience at home. Supplied in a bulk 100-pack , they offer excellent value and reliability. Unscented Tea Light Candles 4 Hour Burn – 100 Pack Zuvo’s premium tea light candles provide up to 4 hours of clean, steady burn with lead-free cotton wicks. The standard 3.8 x 1.3 cm size fits most holders, perfect for weddings, parties, restaurants, or creating a cosy home atmosphere. Supplied in a bulk 100 pack for great value. Are these tea light candles scented? No, Zuvo tea light candles are completely unscented, making them perfect for creating ambience without interfering with food, fragrance, or sensitive environments. How long does each candle burn? Each tea light candle provides up to 4 hours of steady, clean burn. They are designed with lead-free cotton wicks for a smokeless flame. Do these tea lights fit standard holders? Yes, the candles measure approx. 3.8 cm x 1.3 cm and fit all standard tea light holders, lanterns, and decorative displays.
